title: Print build 'STEP' line to stdout, not stderr
body:
The 'STEP' line that's printed as part of the build processing was
going to Stderr and causing some issues for OpenShift who was looking
for it.  Instead print it to Stdout.

Addresses: #1772

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan I think I've cleaned up the test issue now.  I'd changed output for the "STEP" for `from` rather than `build` and that caused the test havoc.
LGTM, matches Docker output more closely now, which is always nice

:pushpin: Commit 8555c88 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 8555c8847a57dfb1a0466be02141ca5cbf413757 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
